news.summary: Approximately 200 new cases of COVID-19 have been reported in the state in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of active cases to over 3,500. Additionally, there have been 10 new deaths related to the virus, bringing the total number of fatalities to 150. Hospitalizations have also increased, with 50% of the state's ICU beds now occupied by COVID-19 patients. The state health department is urging residents to continue practicing safety measures to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: 21Shares teams up with House of Doge to introduce global Dogecoin ETPs, expanding investment options.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Toronto, an official announcement was made to all staff, associates, and clients regarding a cyber attack on the company. The original website, www.visiongroupca.com, and corporate email domain @farvision.ca were compromised. This incident has led to disruptions in the system's operations as a result of the breach.
news.headline: Visionary Holdings Inc.'s website and email system hacked; www.visiongroupca.com and @farvision.ca compromised.

news.summary: In the upcoming US inflation report for March, experts anticipate a slight decrease in the Consumer Price Index (CPI). This respite comes before the expected impact of President Trump's tariffs on various goods. The relief is expected to primarily affect the prices of everyday items, with the CPI projected to drop by approximately 0.2%. This temporary decline is seen as a breather before the potential inflationary effects of the impending tariffs take hold.
news.headline: March CPI in US to provide slight relief before Trump's tariffs impact.

news.summary: Auli'i Cravalho, an actor and environmental advocate, hosted an event at the Natural History Museum in London to recognize the coastal communities involved in a major coral reef restoration initiative on April 10, 2025. The program is one of the world's largest efforts in this field. The event was sponsored by the SHEBA® brand, which is under the Mars family of companies.
news.headline: Actor Auli'i Cravalho hosts world premiere of 'Reef Builders' at London's Natural History Museum to honor coastal communities in largest coral reef restoration program. #SHEBA #coralreef #London
Carmignac's Allier believes cash is the safest option for investors.

news.summary: Bitcoin, established in 2009, has maintained its position as the leading cryptocurrency. It boasts the highest market capitalization among digital assets, solidifying its status as the most well-known in the sector.
news.headline: Will alternate cryptos surpass Bitcoin? The battle for market dominance continues. BTC, created in 2009, leads with the highest market cap.

news.summary: A significant sell-off occurred in the stock market today following the implementation of widespread tariffs by President Trump. The Dow Jones Industrial Average plummeted by almost 1,700 points, while small cap stocks entered bear territory. Techs, small caps, banks, private equity, and various other stocks were heavily impacted by the market downturn. The sharp decline prompted concerns among investors, leading to a tumultuous trading day.
news.headline: Stock market plunges nearly 1,700 points due to tariffs by President Trump; techs, small caps, banks hit hard.

news.summary: A high-ranking White House trade adviser, Peter Navarro, supported President Trump's tariffs in a recent statement. However, the Treasury Secretary hinted at a potential shift in stance, indicating that the United States could be open to negotiations. This development comes amidst escalating trade tensions, with significant implications on the global economy. The differing opinions reflect a complex situation, with tariffs impacting various industries and countries. The potential for negotiation could offer a glimmer of hope amid the uncertainty, as the US considers its position in ongoing trade discussions. The statements from Navarro and the Treasury Secretary underscore the importance of finding a balance between protectionist measures and diplomatic efforts in trade relations. The outcome of these deliberations could have far-reaching consequences, with potential repercussions on key economic indicators and international trade agreements. The upcoming negotiations will likely be closely monitored by stakeholders worldwide, as they seek clarity on the future direction of US trade policy.
news.headline: Navarro supports tariffs as Trump mulls negotiations. Treasury signals readiness for talks. #TradeWar

news.summary: An analyst from Goldman Sachs, Alexander Blostein, predicts that Capital Markets stocks will see decreased EPS forecasts due to uncertainties in macro and policy environments, volatile equity markets, and falling short-term interest rates. Blostein's 2025 projections are roughly 5% lower than the consensus, excluding Exchanges. Alternative Manager stocks are at higher risk for EPS reductions, with a potential 30% downside to Street estimates, attributed to reduced realization activity and a slower FRE growth rate, which is now projected to average 11% in 2025E (down from about 15% previously). Blostein highlights Brookfield Asset Management Inc (NYSE: BAM) as one of the most resilient, benefiting from index inclusion, while TPG Inc. (NASDAQ: TPG) and KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE) face challenges. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs analyst predicts EPS pressure for Capital Markets stocks due to market volatility and interest rates, expects average 5% below consensus estimates for 2025. Brookfield Asset Management stands out as resilient. Alternative Manager stocks face 30% downside risk to Street estimates. FRE growth trajectory expected to average 11% in 2025E.

news.summary: The international IPO market saw a significant rebound, witnessing 291 IPOs that raised a total of $29.3 billion, indicating a 20% increase in value year-over-year. In the US, the first quarter of the year marked the third-highest performance in history with 59 companies going public. Artificial Intelligence (AI) has emerged as a dominant element in the business stories of firms in the Technology, Financials, and Health and Life Sciences sectors going public.
news.headline: Global IPO market on the rise: 291 IPOs raised US$29.3b in Q1 2025, 20% YoY growth. US had 59 listings, 3rd-strongest Q1 performance. AI key in Tech, Financials, Health IPOs.

news.summary: A recent report by South Pole revealed that despite global efforts to decarbonize, financial institutions (FIs) remain hesitant to decrease their investments in fossil fuels. The report, which surveyed sustainability executives from 350 firms in the financial sector, highlighted this reluctance. The data collected underscores the challenge in transitioning towards sustainable practices within FIs. The report's findings indicate a pressing need for increased initiatives to shift investments towards more environmentally friendly alternatives.
news.headline: Financial institutions globally aim to decarbonise, yet remain invested in fossil fuels, as highlighted in South Pole's report surveying 350 firms - PRNewswire.

news.summary: Janover Inc. (Nasdaq: JNVR) disclosed plans to conduct a live X Spaces discussion on April 10, 2025, at 2:30 p.m. Eastern Time. This event will showcase key executives from the Company and provide insights into their strategy.
news.headline: Janover Inc. (Nasdaq: JNVR) to hold X Spaces talk on Crypto Treasury Vehicles on April 10, 2025 at 2:30 p.m. ET.
UK RICS Housing Survey Actual 2 (Forecast 8, Previous 11)

news.summary: Uniden America based in Flower Mound, Texas, has recently appointed J.J. Langguth as the National Sales and Dealership Manager, showcasing their dedication to innovation and leadership. Langguth, an automotive industry expert, is known for his success in driving growth and profitability in the 12v Retailer and Car Dealership sector. His strategic collaborations and pioneering solutions have made him a standout professional in the industry. This move highlights Uniden's commitment to excellence and growth in the market.
news.headline: Uniden appoints J.J. Langguth as National Sales and Dealership Manager, solidifying leadership position in the automotive sector.

news.summary: The Chisholm Trail Arts Council is hosting a live performance of Paperback Writer, The Beatles Experience at the Simmons Center Theatre on April 19th at 7:30pm in Duncan, Oklahoma. The event, sponsored by ARVEST Bank, is part of the CTAC Live Concert Series.
news.headline: Beatles Experience Live on April 19th at 7:30pm in Duncan, Oklahoma, sponsored by ARVEST Bank. Presented by Chisholm Trail Arts Council.

news.summary: ITOCHU International Inc. is making a strategic investment in Veros Credit, LLC to boost the latter's expansion in the U.S. automotive finance sector. This collaboration will utilize ITOCHU's extensive financial knowledge and Veros Credit's innovative technology, aiming to drive growth.
news.headline: Veros Credit to receive strategic investment from ITOCHU International Inc. to boost growth in U.S. auto finance market.

news.summary: A collaboration between Osprey Custom 4X4 and Suits LA creator Aaron Korsh resulted in the custom 4X4 being featured on the NBC legal drama series. The debut took place on April 9, 2025, in Castle Hayne, North Carolina. Osprey Custom 4X4 expressed gratitude for the opportunity to work with Aaron Korsh and the Suits LA team on this venture.
news.headline: Osprey Custom 4X4 features in NBC's Suits LA; collaboration with creator Aaron Korsh.

news.summary: Prevent Blindness has recently promoted a total of five staff members in various departments including executive, marketing and communications, government affairs, and public health. The organization, based in Chicago and recognized as the top eye health and safety group in the country, shared this update on April 9, 2025. These changes demonstrate the commitment to growth and development within the organization.
news.headline: Prevent Blindness promotes five staff members to address increased demand for vision education.

news.summary: ClinicMind, a top cloud-based platform specializing in multidisciplinary practice management, celebrates its recent success with eight G2 Spring 2025 Awards in the areas of Chiropractic, EHR, and Medical Billing. This achievement signifies the company's remarkable consistency in securing industry recognition, as it now boasts an impressive 11 consecutive quarters of G2 leadership.
news.headline: ClinicMind wins 8 G2 Spring Awards in 2025, marking 11 quarters of industry leadership in Chiropractic, EHR, and Medical Billing.

news.summary: In the Gulf Coast region, discussions are ongoing regarding the suitability of asphalt shingle roofs for homes in the area in light of potential hurricane-related damages. Homeowners who have encountered severe storms are taking action without waiting for revised regulations.
news.headline: Homeowners in Gulf Coast taking proactive steps to protect homes amid uncertainty of using asphalt shingle roofs in hurricanes.

news.summary: Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a prominent international law firm, had two of its shareholders, Daniel H. Black and Bobby Rosenbloum, acknowledged in Variety's 2025 "Legal Impact Report." This recognition came in a recent announcement dated April 9, 2025, based in Atlanta. This prestigious inclusion underscores their contributions to the legal field. Daniel H. Black and Bobby Rosenbloum's distinction in this report highlights their exceptional performance and influence. The report itself is a notable publication that signifies the impact of legal professionals on significant industry matters. This recognition bears significance not only for the individuals but also for the firm they represent.
news.headline: Greenberg Traurig's Daniel H. Black and Bobby Rosenbloum featured in Variety's 2025 'Legal Impact Report' in a global recognition.

news.summary: Jim Owen has been named as the new Managing Director at BaseRock Partners, a prominent investment firm. With an extensive background of more than 30 years in investment banking, Owen will focus on enhancing the firm's advisory offerings within the architecture, engineering, and industrial services industries. The announcement was made in Denver on April 9, 2025.
news.headline: BaseRock Partners appoints Jim Owen as Managing Director to expand advisory services in engineering and construction sectors.

news.summary: GreenbergFarrow (GF) has bolstered its national MEP engineering practice by acquiring SCEG, melding 25 years of specialized West Coast experience with a broad nationwide presence to offer comprehensive and innovative solutions. The acquisition is part of GF’s strategy to expand its reach and enhance its service offerings. The move, announced in Atlanta on April 9, 2025, will provide clients access to a wider array of expertise and resources. This union will combine the strengths of both firms and leverage their respective strengths to better serve their clients.
news.headline: GreenbergFarrow enhances MEP engineering with SCEG acquisition, uniting 25 years of West Coast experience with a nationwide reach.

news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on April 9, 2025, the Educating All Learners Alliance (EALA) announced they will be offering unrestricted grant funds to up-and-coming leaders who demonstrate outstanding contributions in the field of special education. EALA is a collective of more than 160 partner organizations devoted to this cause.
news.headline: Educating All Learners Alliance launches 2025 Champions Fund, granting support to leaders in special education.

news.summary: The ongoing expansion of the compounding pharmacy has led to the creation of numerous jobs and positive effects on the community, showcasing the company's dedication to progress and high standards. Located in PLANO, Texas, as of April 9, 2025, Texas Star Pharmacy, a prominent provider of tailored healthcare and pharmaceutical services, is experiencing significant growth.
news.headline: Texas Star Pharmacy in Plano celebrates milestone of 100 employees, showcasing growth and community impact.

news.summary: Deciso® has introduced OPNsense® Business Edition 25.4, designed for enterprise settings looking for improved control, smooth remote access, and operational efficiency. OPNsense® is a highly popular open-source firewall platform known for its reliability and functionality. The latest release, version 25.4, offers various features to cater to business needs and ensure a secure network environment.
news.headline: Deciso launches OPNsense Business Edition 25.4 for enterprises offering secure VPN access and cost-effective network management.

news.summary: INFINITI HR is advising employers of all sizes to act promptly as the April 15 tax filing deadline nears. Amid 2024 tax regulations, the company emphasizes the importance of full compliance to secure optimal benefits. Based in COLUMBIA, Md., this guidance follows an announcement made on April 9, 2025. INFINITI HR stresses the need for immediate steps to leverage tax tips and credits efficiently. With various tax incentives at stake, staying vigilant and informed is crucial for businesses.
news.headline: INFINITI HR urges timely 2024 tax filing, offers tips, and credits. Compliance crucial for employers.

news.summary: Stalker Sport and AWRE Sports have joined forces to incorporate Stalker's radar data on speed and spin rate into AWRE's platform, benefiting baseball and softball players. This collaboration will provide in-depth performance analysis and automated highlight reels for recruitment purposes.
news.headline: Stalker Sport and AWRE Sports collaborate to integrate speed & spin radar data into video platform for baseball & softball athletes, creating automated highlight reels.

news.summary: In a bid to streamline marketing compliance amidst regulatory uncertainties, Warrant, the AI-driven marketing compliance platform, has secured $720,000 in pre-seed funding. The funding comes with significant support from Brickyard, Capitalize VC, and Vast Ventures. The announcement was made in New York on April 9, 2025. Warrant aims to simplify the complex landscape of marketing regulations by leveraging artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Warrant secures $720K in pre-seed funding to boost marketing compliance in financial services, real estate, and insurance.

news.summary: In South Florida's latest reality series, the energetic vibes of urban culture in Pompano Beach clash with the gritty essence of South Florida life. Titled "Knights of Broward County," the show combines the chaos of Jersey Shore with the hustle of Love & Hip Hop. Set in Pompano Beach, this raw depiction of life in South Florida promises viewers a unique and intense experience. Scheduled to air in April 2025, the series aims to captivate audiences with its unfiltered portrayal of the local scene. Get ready for a rollercoaster ride packed with thrilling drama and unexpected plot twists.
news.headline: New reality series "Knights of Broward County" showcases culture vs. survival in Pompano Beach, FL. Mix of "Jersey Shore chaos" and "Love & Hip Hop hustle."Characters confront challenges with urban culture in South Florida's raw environment. Vibe of entertainment mixed with reality.

news.summary: Pneumeric, Inc. has announced an expansion in its distribution channel by partnering with Henry Schein Medical, the U.S. medical division of the global leader in healthcare solutions for dental and medical practitioners, Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC). This collaboration aims to market Pneumeric's Pneumothorax product. Pneumeric, Inc. will leverage Henry Schein Medical's extensive reach in the industry to increase the availability and visibility of its Pneumothorax product, catering to a larger customer base.
news.headline: Pneumeric, Inc. partners with Henry Schein Medical for Capnospot® distribution to EMS customers, expanding reach. Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), global health care solutions provider, facilitates commercialization.

news.summary: Medical specialists at UT Health San Antonio have pioneered the use of innovative technology for individuals with movement disorders. This cutting-edge technique allows for deep brain stimulation that adjusts according to the fluctuations in symptoms. The development was introduced in San Antonio on April 9, 2025.
news.headline: Neurologists at UT Health San Antonio use new technology for deep brain stimulation that adapts to symptoms.

news.summary: Flushing, New York - On April 9, 2025, the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) granted approval to Vaughn College to provide a specialized training program aimed at facilitating an expedited route to employment for students aspiring to become air traffic controllers. This initiative offers a faster track for individuals looking to join this profession.
news.headline: Vaughn College gets FAA approval for new air traffic control program offering accelerated employment path.

news.summary: Amy's Attic Self Storage in BELTON, Texas, made a generous contribution of $5,000 to the Eldred's Nursery Foundation. This nonprofit in Belton focuses on supporting individuals with disabilities by helping them acquire job skills, foster independence, and gain practical business expertise. The donation was announced on April 9, 2025.
news.headline: Amy's Attic Self Storage donates $5,000 to Eldred's Nursery Foundation in Texas, supporting adults with special needs.

news.summary: Located in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) has recently acquired an automotive service property in Arkansas for $5.3 million. The property is situated in a popular corridor with high foot traffic and is leased to a national operator under a long-term triple net lease agreement. FCPT, a real estate investment trust specializing in owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties, made the announcement of this acquisition.
news.headline: FCPT buys automotive property in AR for $5.3M, on long-term lease to national operator, in high-traffic location.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month. The number of unemployed individuals now stands at 8.4 million, showcasing a positive trend in the job market. Furthermore, the report indicated that the economy added 450,000 new jobs, indicating robust growth and recovery. Experts believe that these numbers reflect a strengthening economy and provide hope for sustained improvement in the future.
news.headline: Wall Street sees biggest stock rally since 2008. Markets surge. #StockMarket #WallStreet
NAB now: Reserve Bank of Australia cutting key rate by 50 basis points in May
NAB forecasts RBA cash rate to drop to 2.6% by February 2026

news.summary: The online giant is launching spacecraft to provide wireless service from space, but still has significant work ahead to rival SpaceX's Starlink.
news.headline: Live video: Amazon debuts Project Kuiper satellites for wireless service from space, facing SpaceX's Starlink competition.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, headquartered in Birmingham, Michigan, OneStream, Inc. (NASDAQ: OS) announced as the top enterprise Finance management platform. OneStream revolutionizes the Office of the CFO by integrating essential finance and operational roles like financial close, consolidation, reporting, and planning.
news.headline: OneStream to announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 9, 2025. Based in Birmingham, Mich. (NASDAQ: OS) leading finance management platform.

news.summary: On Wednesday, pharmaceutical companies experienced significant volatility as President Trump announced plans to impose substantial tariffs on drug imports, only to later withdraw the proposal. Following these events, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 saw a rebound in pharmaceutical stocks. This uncertainty surrounding tariffs caused fluctuations in the market, but ultimately pharma companies managed to recover. The situation underscores the impact of political decisions on financial markets.
news.headline: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Pharma stocks recover as Trump initially proposed "major" tariffs on drug imports but backed off.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 5.6% in 2021, following a contraction of 3.5% in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. This predicted growth is largely attributed to an increase in vaccinations and government stimulus packages. The forecast also suggests that advanced economies are projected to grow by around 5.4% this year, while emerging and developing economies are expected to see a growth rate of approximately 6%. However, income inequality is expected to widen, with nearly 90 million people likely to fall below the extreme poverty threshold. Additionally, global trade is estimated to increase by about 9.5% in 2021 after a 5.3% decline in the previous year. The report emphasizes the importance of continued policy support to ensure a robust and inclusive recovery for all countries.
news.headline: Were Trump's tariffs part of a plan that included a 90-day pause? - Article on Bloomberg.com
Carney: Discussions with Trump right after election

news.summary: Legislators have rejected a regulation that would have granted the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau authority to supervise payment applications of tech firms.
news.headline: House overturns $5 overdraft fee limit, and rejects rule granting Consumer Financial Protection Bureau oversight of tech companies' payment apps. Issue now goes to Trump.
